manuscript_title: A Precision-Controlled Null Result for a Khinchin-Signature PSLQ Family

EXPMATH-WITHDRAWAL-KSPSLQ-001 (2026-05-18) — withdrawal email drafted; gating downstream submission until written confirmation or 10 business days

stage_1_verification_gates.halt_gate_policy: PASS (no AI ban, no mandatory institutional affiliation, no mandatory non-pseudonymous, no conflict with relay-4 backup designation)

stage_2_style_conversion.class_file: amsart fallback (baustms.cls archive unreachable 2026-05-18; BAustMS review submissions are PDF-only, source class file only required post-acceptance)
stage_2_style_conversion.compile_result: 5 pages, 0 errors, 0 LaTeX warnings, 0 overfull boxes >5pt, 2 cosmetic underfull \hbox (badness 2042, 10000)
changes_from_source_tex: abstract moved inside document and before \maketitle (amsart convention)
table label T7 renumbered to T6 (cosmetic; T6 was historically skipped in working files)

rewrote Computational and AI Disclosure into Acknowledgements and disclosures with CUP-conforming wording (4 affirmations: not authors, author accountable, work is author's own, AI used only for coding/workflow/drafting/review)
added Data availability and reproducibility section citing Zenodo concept and v1.0 DOIs
reordered bibliography alphabetically by first-author surname

stage_3_content_adaptation.abstract_word_count_recount: ~160 words (under 200-word cap; original ~213 estimate was incorrect)

open_operator_actions: verify 3 named reviewers are currently active before submission
register/confirm OJS account at journal.austms.org.au if not previously registered
wait for Exp Math withdrawal confirmation (or 10-business-day timeout) per EXPMATH-WITHDRAWAL-KSPSLQ-001 before submitting

decisions_taken_and_rationale.decision: use amsart class as fallback for baustms.cls
decisions_taken_and_rationale.rationale: archive.austms.org.au TCP-timed out on 2026-05-18; baustms.cls unreachable. BAustMS review submissions are PDF-only and the journal class file is only required post-acceptance (verified via cambridge.org and austms.org.au author instructions on 2026-05-18). amsart is the closest AmS-LaTeX cousin and produces a clean journal-style PDF.
decisions_taken_and_rationale.reversibility: fully reversible — operator can swap documentclass to baustms once the archive comes back online and recompile

decisions_taken_and_rationale.decision: populate the author block with Papanokechi + affiliation rather than anonymize
decisions_taken_and_rationale.rationale: BAustMS review model defaults to single-blind via OJS (not double-anonymous like Math Comp). ORCID is mandatory in submission metadata. The previous anonymized \author{} was an Experimental-Mathematics-specific accommodation.

decisions_taken_and_rationale.decision: renumber T7 to T6 in the tables and body text
decisions_taken_and_rationale.rationale: the T6 label was historically skipped in the upstream working file (claude-chat/khinchin-signature-pslq/paper/agent_h_table1.tex). Sequential labelling avoids referee/editor confusion at zero substantive cost.
decisions_taken_and_rationale.reversibility: fully reversible (working copy only; original source.tex untouched per task instructions)

decisions_taken_and_rationale.rationale: recount yielded ~160 words, well under the 200-word cap. The original 213-word estimate (from compaction notes) was wrong. Keeping the 'Open directions' sentence preserves the calibration framing.

original phrasing said 'Anthropic Claude for ... mathematical review', which could be read as AI independently validating mathematics. Rewrote to confine AI roles to drafting/exposition/workflow and to add the four CUP affirmations explicitly (not authors, author accountable, work is author's own, citations).

decisions_taken_and_rationale.decision: add dedicated KhinchinSignatureBundle2026 bibliography entry citing the paper-specific Zenodo deposit
decisions_taken_and_rationale.rationale: the original source.tex only cited AEAL-19562751 (the framework deposit), not the paper's own reproducibility bundle. Adding a paper-level citation makes the Data availability section anchor on a stable DOI.

halt_gates_passed: Stage 1.4 disqualifying-policy gate: BAustMS allows AI-assisted, pseudonymous, no-institutional-affiliation submissions
operator_decision_points_open: Suggested reviewers list: 3 named candidates need current-activity verification; 1 slot left open for an Australia/Asia-Pacific reviewer of operator/editor choice.
OJS account: confirm registration at journal.austms.org.au or register new account with pen-name 'Papanokechi' and email shkubo@outlook.jp before submission.

Submission timing: gated on EXPMATH-WITHDRAWAL-KSPSLQ-001 — either written confirmation that the Exp Math draft has been removed OR 10 business days from withdrawal-email send with no response (whichever comes first).
baustms.cls download: optional retry if archive.austms.org.au comes back online; not blocking for review-stage submission.
final_recommendation: READY TO SUBMIT — gated on Exp Math withdrawal confirmation per EXPMATH-WITHDRAWAL-KSPSLQ-001 and on operator vetting of suggested reviewers
